chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-144 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Priority Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of MA 1294/23 27-11-2023 None present for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** None present for the applicant. No intimation is received so far. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non- prosecution a/w listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
